raw_output: {"predictions": [{"common_name": "Brown Goshawk", "scientific_name": "Accipiter fasciatus", "rank_hint": "species", "confidence": 0.85, "field_marks": "Uniform dark sooty-brown plumage, bright yellow iris, accipiter shape with long tail and relatively slender legs, perched over avian prey on grassy ground"}, {"common_name": "Collared Sparrowhawk", "scientific_name": "Accipiter cirrocephalus", "rank_hint": "species", "confidence": 0.7, "field_marks": "Similar accipiter form, dark plumage variant, yellow eye, long barred tail (obscured here) and slender build"}, {"common_name": "goshawk (sparrowhawk)", "scientific_name": "Accipiter sp.", "rank_hint": "genus", "confidence": 0.95, "field_marks": "Typical Accipiter raptor silhouette: short broad wings, long tail, sharp talons, predatory stance on ground with prey"}, {"common_name": "Accipitridae hawk", "scientific_name": null, "rank_hint": "family", "confidence": 0.98, "field_marks": "Diurnal raptor, hooked bill, strong talons, predatory behavior, dark plumage and yellow eye characteristic of many Accipitridae species"}], "abstain": false, "abstain_reason": null, "overall_confidence": 0.85}
